raw.subject: Your Warner Robins page caught my eye
raw.body:
Hi,

I loved the Thanksgiving color post on your Facebook page – it really adds a touch of warmth to the holiday season. The Best Nails Salon in Warner Robins has such a great reputation in the community, and I'm sure your customers appreciate that personal touch.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might be leaving some potential bookings or calls on the table. As a local salon, having a website can help you reach a wider audience and make it easier for customers to find and book appointments.

I took a look at your Facebook photos and posts and sketched out a simple page idea that highlights your services menu, work gallery, and booking CTA. You can see what I came up with here: https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/le-s-nails-spa-warner-robins

This is just a starting point, and I'd love to discuss how to bring this idea to life in a way that works for your business. If you're interested in learning more about how a website can help you grow your salon, I'd be happy to chat with you about a flat fee for local businesses and answer any questions you may have. Just reply to this email or give me a quick call.
